recommendations.title: Re-route burst traffic
recommendations.description: Move short-lived requests away from the busiest path to reduce queueing delay.

recommendations.title: Scale network-intensive workers
recommendations.description: Provision more capacity for throughput-heavy services during the predicted spike.

recommendations.title: Prioritize latency-sensitive flows
recommendations.description: Apply QoS rules to preserve response time for critical traffic classes.

insights.title: Prediction confidence remains high
insights.description: The model found a consistent upward trend after 10:10, likely caused by burst traffic accumulation.

insights.title: Best intervention window is now
insights.description: Applying routing and scaling before the next spike should protect the SLA and reduce expected delay.

insights.title: Critical flows should be prioritized
insights.description: Latency-sensitive service classes can be preserved by using policy-based queue prioritization.

alertText: The model detects a rising latency slope. Consider optimization before SLA risk crosses the warning threshold.
